_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1025 — Small Residential Income Property (2-4 units). Updated for Phase 5.
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1025 report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py — copy automation_id and class_name/class_index values from the output. 4) POST http://localhost:5180/reload-maps to apply. 5) Run: python _test_aci_live.py 1025 to verify.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label (used for label-match fallback)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId — MOST RELIABLE. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls (e.g. 'RichEdit20W'). Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls. Fill in from /calibrate output as fallback.
_schema.max_chars: Maximum character limit for the field (ACI enforces strict limits)

narratives._comment: Main narrative sections for 1025 report (AI-generated text fields)

offering_history.label: Offering History
offering_history.notes: Contract/offering section — narrative about prior listing/offering history and current contract terms

contract_analysis.label: Contract Analysis
contract_analysis.notes: Contract section — analysis of agreement of sale, financing, seller concessions, lease assumptions

concessions.label: Concessions / Financial Assistance
concessions.notes: Financial assistance and concessions narrative — market context for seller concessions

neighborhood_boundaries.label: Neighborhood Boundaries
neighborhood_boundaries.notes: Neighborhood section — cardinal direction boundaries (north, south, east, west)

neighborhood_description.label: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.notes: Neighborhood section — description with emphasis on rental market and multi-family prevalence

market_conditions.label: Market Conditions Addendum
market_conditions.notes: Neighborhood section — market conditions with emphasis on rental market data and vacancy rates

site_comments.label: Site / Utilities / Adverse Conditions
site_comments.notes: Site section — site description, utilities, zoning, adverse conditions for multi-unit property

improvements_condition.label: Improvements / Condition Narrative
improvements_condition.notes: Improvements section — condition rating, unit mix, kitchen/bath status, common areas for rental property

adverse_conditions.label: Adverse Conditions / External Factors
adverse_conditions.notes: Improvements section — adverse conditions affecting rental viability (environmental, neighborhood, zoning)

functional_utility.label: Functional Utility
functional_utility.notes: Improvements section — unit configuration, layout efficiency for rental operations

functional_utility_conformity.label: Functional Utility / Conformity
functional_utility_conformity.notes: Improvements section — subject conformity to neighborhood as rental property

income_approach.label: Income Approach Narrative
income_approach.notes: Income section — comprehensive income approach with market rent, GRM, cap rate analysis

sales_comparison_commentary.label: Sales Comparison Commentary
sales_comparison_commentary.notes: Sales section — comparable selection rationale and adjustment justification

sca_summary.label: Sales Comp Analysis Summary
sca_summary.notes: Sales section — summary of comparable analysis findings

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation
reconciliation.notes: Reconciliation section — reconciliation of three approaches with final value conclusion. HIGH PRIORITY.

exposure_time.label: Exposure Time / Marketing Time
exposure_time.notes: Reconciliation section — typical marketing time for similar multi-unit properties

data_fields._comment: Key data entry fields (drop-down, checkbox, numeric) that may be populated from extracted data

zoning.label: Zoning Classification
zoning.notes: Site section — zoning that permits multi-family use

site_area.label: Site Area / Lot Size
site_area.notes: Site section — lot size in square feet or acres

total_gla.label: Total GLA
total_gla.notes: Improvements section — gross living area for entire property

_tab_positions._note: Tab navigation positions (to be filled in from ACI calibration)
